items.title: Software SIM card for testing
items.oneliner: PC-hosted SIM emulator lets you test smartphone SIM flows without physical cards or carrier hardware.

items.title: Apple SecureROM exploit toolkit
items.oneliner: Working A12 and A13 bootrom exploit with firmware, hardware docs, and status signals for reproducible device research.

items.title: Raspberry Pi Pico audio DSP
items.oneliner: Turns a Pico into a USB sound card with EQ, crossovers, room correction, and S/PDIF or I2S output.

items.title: PgBouncer explained for production
items.oneliner: Practical PgBouncer guide covers pooling modes, sizing, auth, and production pitfalls for overloaded Postgres apps.

items.title: Browser course for Jest and Vitest
items.oneliner: Free interactive course teaches assertions, mocks, async tests, snapshots, and fake timers directly in the browser.

items.title: Flink native S3 filesystem
items.oneliner: Drop-in Flink S3 plugin roughly doubles checkpoint speed while removing Hadoop dependencies from production stacks.

items.title: Fintech reliability engineering handbook
items.oneliner: Concrete handbook covers money types, data integrity, and failure patterns for engineers building financial systems.

items.title: IBM MCGA reverse engineering repo
items.oneliner: Deep hardware teardown includes die analysis, undocumented behavior, and schematics for IBM's MCGA graphics chipset.

items.title: Material design with Beer CSS
items.oneliner: Installable CSS framework ships semantic components, dynamic theming, and CDN or npm setup for fast Material-style UIs.

items.title: PostgreSQL can replace extra infrastructure
items.oneliner: Detailed examples show how Postgres handles auditing, transactions, and analytics without adding specialized databases.
